contactMethods.title: Reserve a Table
contactMethods.body: Book your table online through our reservations system. Available for all dining services — dinner, brunch, and bar seating.

contactMethods.title: Event Inquiries
contactMethods.body: Planning a private dinner, corporate event, birthday, or full venue buyout? Submit an inquiry and our events team responds within 24 hours.

contactMethods.title: Takeout & Delivery
contactMethods.body: Order Louisiana Purchase for takeout or delivery. The full menu is available online through our ordering system.

location.bodySuffix: . Street parking available on University Ave and surrounding streets.

social.title: @LouisianaPurchaseBar
social.body: Follow us on Instagram and Facebook for daily specials, event announcements, and a behind-the-scenes look at the kitchen and bar.

props.title: Contact Louisiana Purchase | North Park San Diego
props.description: Contact Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego. Reservations, private event inquiries, general questions, and directions to 2305 University Ave.
